generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our reliance on foreign tech puts our national security at risk. The recent chip shortage proved we can't afford to depend on others for critical infrastructure. Strategic autonomy isn't about isolation - it's about ensuring we have the domestic capacity to protect our citizens when crises hit. Our allies understand this; it's time our leaders do too. #NationalSecurityFirst
